hub.subtitle: Quick brain-training games that feed your dashboard streak.

memoryMatch.title: Memory Match
memoryMatch.instructions: Flip two cards at a time and find every matching pair.

sequencePuzzle.title: Sequence Puzzle
sequencePuzzle.instructions: What comes next in the sequence?
sequencePuzzle.prompt: What comes next in the sequence?

mathRush.title: Mental Math Rush
mathRush.instructions: Solve as many quick problems as you can before time runs out.

mentalRotation.title: Mental Rotation Challenge
mentalRotation.instructions: Which option is a true rotation of this shape, not a mirror image?
mentalRotation.prompt: Which option is a true rotation of this shape, not a mirror image?

selectiveAttention.title: Selective Attention Challenge
selectiveAttention.instructions: Click the one arrow pointing a different direction.
selectiveAttention.prompt: Click the one arrow pointing a different direction.

workingMemorySpan.title: Working Memory Challenge
workingMemorySpan.instructions: Remember a sequence of digits, then tap them back in order.
workingMemorySpan.recallForward: Tap the digits back in the SAME order.
workingMemorySpan.recallBackward: Tap the digits back in REVERSE order.
workingMemorySpan.nbackPrompt: Press MATCH if this digit is the same as the one shown 2 digits ago.

visualSpatialMemory.title: Visual & Spatial Memory
visualSpatialMemory.instructions: Memorize positions and icons, then answer what you saw.
visualSpatialMemory.whichIconWasAt: Which icon was at the highlighted cell?
visualSpatialMemory.whichNotShown: Which of these icons was NOT shown?
visualSpatialMemory.watchPath: Watch the sequence of highlighted cells.
visualSpatialMemory.tapPath: Tap the cells back in the same order.

cognitiveCommandCenter.title: Cognitive Command Center
cognitiveCommandCenter.instructions: Switch quickly between short tasks as the rules change.
cognitiveCommandCenter.goPrompt: Tap ONLY the green circle. Ignore the red one.
cognitiveCommandCenter.recallPrompt: What number was shown 2 rounds ago?
